options.a: The L2 frequency is used, and compared to the data received from the L1 frequency, to reduce the ionospheric error.
options.b: A pseudolite is positioned close to the runway, transmitting information about the ionospheric and tropospheric errors to nearby aircraft.
options.c: An extra satellite is used to verify the integrity of the signals from the other satellites.
options.d: Information about the ionosphere is up-linked to a geostationary satellite, which distributes the information to properly equipped receivers.
